description_long: This trash bin features a square, matte black central container surrounded by vertical wooden slats, each with a visible round fastener near the base. The wooden slats are evenly spaced and extend slightly above the rim of the bin, providing a decorative and protective outer shell. The central container appears to be made of metal or a durable composite, designed for outdoor use in urban environments. The top of the bin is open, allowing for easy disposal of waste, and there is no visible lid or covering mechanism. The overall design is modern and robust, blending natural wood textures with industrial materials. There are no visible handles, wheels, or signage on the exterior.
description: A modern trash bin with a matte black square container encased by vertical wooden slats, open-topped and unmarked, with a sturdy and decorative design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, central black container, and evenly spaced wooden slats with visible fasteners.
description_view_1: Side view with a similar arrangement of wooden slats, highlighting the depth and thickness of the wood panels.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same open top and wooden slat configuration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the consistent design of the wooden slats and open container.
